_comment: Canonical record history. Edit this file, then run scripts/update_leaderboard.py to regenerate README + RECORDS.md. CI fails if they drift.

records.author: Saivineeth147
records.description: Baseline: plain LoRA r=16 on all linear layers, 3 epochs, cosine LR. No tricks.
records.notes: Seed record at track freeze (tag spec-v1-frozen). 3/3 runs clear the 57.0% target.

records.author: Saivineeth147
records.description: Sequence packing + completion-only loss masking, 2 epochs. Same LoRA config as #0; ~2x faster at higher accuracy.
records.notes: Eliminates the baseline's padding waste (packing) and prompt-token loss (completion-only masking). Adapter identical to #0, so the gain is pure data-pipeline.

records.author: Saivineeth147
records.description: Track 2 baseline: plain LoRA r=16 on SQuAD, first 20k examples, 1 epoch, full-sequence loss. No tricks.
records.notes: Seed record at track 2 freeze (tag spec-t2-frozen). Run 3 (953.4s, seed 350590137) was a Modal volume I/O stall — wall-clock >1.5x the batch median while accuracy stayed normal — so its TIME is dropped from the official mean as infrastructure noise per the infra-outlier rule (its accuracy still counts). Official time is the mean of the two clean runs (523.5, 527.2 -> 525.4s); to be re-run to restore a clean 3-seed timing set. See issue #7.

records.author: Piotr Migdał
records.description: One 4e-4 epoch over 3,000 examples with 2x optimizer updates (integrated-LR), 512-token packs. First outside record.
records.notes: First outside submission. Official rerun (113.0s) beat the self-report (122.2s).

records.author: Piotr Migdał
records.description: Shortest-4k data pruning, 1 aggressive-LR epoch, <<...>> annotations stripped, custom GPU-resident packed loop, chunked completion-only CE (no full logits).
records.notes: Chunked completion-CE never materializes the 151k-vocab logits tensor. 11m57s -> 1m44s in three days across three records and two authors.
